user.title: Set up Mic to MediaPlayer
user.description: Connect a Wyoming microphone to a media player for voice control.

data_description.wyoming_host: IP address or hostname of the Wyoming service (e.g. 192.168.1.100)
data_description.wyoming_port: TCP port of the Wyoming service (default: 10700)
data_description.media_player_entity_id: TTS response will be played on this media player
data_description.language: Language code e.g. 'en' for English, 'de' for German. Leave empty for the pipeline default language.
data_description.silence_seconds: How many seconds of silence before recording stops

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Wyoming service. Please check host and port.
